description: These ethnic look slip-ons from catwalk are perfect for everyday wear and versatile enough to be worn with everything: from casual jeans and tees to skirts and dresses. They go perfectly with ethnic wear. Upper T-strap on the forefoot Wide strap covering the midfoot with heavy embellishments with elasticated ankle strap Soft feel lining for extra comfort Footbed in ergonomic design for extra comfort and added style Outsole TPU outsole with raised heel Branded grooves on the forefoot and flower shaped heel for added comfort Slipper care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
